summary: Iter 79j.2 fix verified end-to-end. Logged in as Howard, opened Contractor Quotes → Vinyl+Ascend, created a fresh estimate, launched AI Measure → Guided Capture, uploaded /tmp/dummy.png for Step 1/Front. PhotoAnnotateModal auto-opened; walked all 5 guided steps and captured big-title / banner / skip-label / next-label / progress-dot / 'Step X of 5' counter at each stage. ALL 20 assertions across the 5 steps PASS. The two fixes (a) MODE_SCALE_WINDOW injected as step 2 with key 'window-measure' and (b) big-title switch statement using new keys 'window-measure' and 'window-style' both work — no blank titles, sequence is exactly Wall Measurement → Window Measurement → Window Style → Mask → Profile.
critical_code_review_comments: PhotoAnnotateModal.jsx:1301-1307 the 5 big-title strings are still hard-coded inline via chained short-circuit expressions on step.key. If a caller supplies a custom guidedFlow.steps array (line 243) with a key outside {wall,window-measure,window-style,mask,profile}, the big-title row will render empty. Consider moving 'emoji + label' into each step object (e.g. step.title) so custom flows keep a visible header — same review comment carried over from iter 27, still relevant after the key rename.

PhotoAnnotateModal.jsx handleGuidedNext (~line 727) still advances setGuidedStepIdx unconditionally. Contractor can hit Next on Step 1 (Wall Measurement — 'required' per code comment) without placing a scale ref. Same soft-warn/disable suggestion carried over from iter 27.

GuidedCaptureWizard.jsx ~line 301: setTimeout(setAnnotateOpen, 100) pending timer isn't cleared on Retake — if user retakes within the 100ms window the annotator opens against the stale photo url. Carried over from iter 27, likely still present since main agent's fix was scoped to PhotoAnnotateModal.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all 5 guided-step titles + banners + skip labels + Next/Save-&-Continue label + progress-dot counts (1P/4g → 4G/1P) + 'Step X of 5' counter verified

seed_data_creation: Created a new empty Vinyl+Ascend estimate. Used /tmp/dummy.png (600x400 lightgray PNG) as Front elevation photo.
context_for_next_testing_agent:
New 5-step sequence confirmed end-to-end:
 Step 1 = '🎯 Wall Measurement' / 'Wall Measurement — tap two points on a known span (door height, garage height, eave-to-ground) then enter its real length' / dots [P,g,g,g,g] / no skip / next='Next Step →' / 'Step 1 of 5'
 Step 2 = '📏 Window Measurement' / 'Window Measurement — tap two points on ONE known window edge (e.g. a 36" wide window)...' / dots [G,P,g,g,g] / skip='Skip · no window to calibrate' / next='Next Step →' / 'Step 2 of 5'
 Step 3 = '🪟 Window Style' / 'Window Style — tap each window on this wall to place it and tag its style (double-hung, casement, picture, etc.)' / dots [G,G,P,g,g] / skip='Skip · no windows on this wall' / next='Next Step →' / 'Step 3 of 5'
 Step 4 = '🧱 Mask (brick / stone)' / 'Mask — draw a rectangle OR polygon around brick / stone / masonry areas that are NOT getting new siding' / dots [G,G,G,P,g] / skip='Skip · nothing to mask' / next='Next Step →' / 'Step 4 of 5'
 Step 5 = '🏠 Profile' / 'Profile — draw a rectangle OR polygon around each siding profile family (Lap · Shake · B&B · Vertical · etc). Skip if this whole wall is one profile.' / dots [G,G,G,G,P] / skip='Skip · single profile' / next='Save & Continue' / 'Step 5 of 5'

Howard's regression ('skipping Window Measurement, jumping wall→style') is definitively fixed. Steps 2 and 3 render distinct titles ('Window Measurement' vs 'Window Style'); neither is blank; the guidedSteps array in PhotoAnnotateModal.jsx:253-259 uses keys wall/window-measure/window-style/mask/profile that all match the big-title switch at lines 1302-1306.
rca of the issue:
No blocker. Both fixes verified:
 1. guidedSteps array (PhotoAnnotateModal.jsx:253-259) now includes MODE_SCALE_WINDOW as step 2 (key='window-measure') between wall (MODE_SCALE) and window-style (MODE_WINDOW). Verified via 'Step X of 5' counter + progress dots visibly counting up 1→5.
 2. Big-title switch (PhotoAnnotateModal.jsx:1302-1306) uses matching keys ('window-measure', 'window-style' instead of the old 'window', 'style'), so all 5 steps render a non-blank emoji + label. Verified via evaluate() of the .font-heading.uppercase div at each step.
 Also confirmed: skip button (data-testid='annotate-guided-skip-btn') hides on step 1 and shows on steps 2-5; next button label toggles from 'Next Step →' to 'Save & Continue' on step 5; handleGuidedNext advances exactly one step per click.
